lesson.menu_desc: There is / there are + rooms -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- My Home -- There is / there are + rooms
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 6 -- My Home

listenings.text: Hi, I am Mark. Let me tell you about my home. I live in a small house. There is a big kitchen, and there is a living room. In the living room, there is a sofa and a table. There are two bedrooms in my house. There is one bathroom. There are three windows in the living room, so it is very bright. I love my home. It is small, but it is comfortable.

Hello, my name is Anna. I want to tell you about my home. I live in an apartment in the city. There is a kitchen and a living room. There are two bedrooms and one bathroom. In my bedroom, there is a big window. There is a sofa in the living room, but there is no table. I like my home very much. It is quiet, and it is bright in the morning.

extra_audio.text: Sandra shows Mark her home. First, they go to the kitchen. Then, they see the living room. There is a big sofa and a table. Finally, Mark says her home is beautiful.
